videos.headline: Cade McNamara exits game with a torn ACL
videos.description: Iowa QB Cade McNamara falls to the turf and then exits the game with what would be diagnosed as a torn ACL.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cade McNamara exits game with a leg injury) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Erick All gets by multipe defenders for Iowa TD
videos.description: Iowa QB Deacon Hill tosses a short pass to Erick All, who somehow gets through multiple defenders and across the goal line for the score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Erick All gets by multipe defenders for Iowa TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michigan State recovers fumble and returns it to the house
videos.description: Michigan State's Cal Haladay recovers a fumble and returns it 42 yards for a touchdown as Michigan State takes the lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michigan State recovers fumble and returns it to the house) 2023/09/30 ESHEET
